_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the COM/RPC-across-scopes (branch 3) of the excel-activities/excel-application-card-failures playbook. Agent must chain: folders → jobs list faulted → jobs get (COMException RPC_E_DISCONNECTED 0x80010108 on UseExcelFile_2) → jobs logs (UseExcelFile_1 opened+closed EXCEL.EXE cleanly; UseExcelFile_2 attempted to attach to PID that no longer exists; no Excel Process Scope wrapping the sequence) → workflow source (two sequential Use Excel File cards with ReadFormatting=True COM-forcing, no outer Excel Process Scope). The missing Excel Process Scope is the smoking gun.

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key f00ccccc-3333-4444-5555-666677778888 --state Faulted --output json
